payload.summary: OCK turned into lean .pi system: .opencode removed (64M bloat), 5 agents, 15 skills, beads task backend, pi-vcc compaction at 95%, swarm coordination on #ock

payload.message: Starting investigation - need to create 4 slash commands (prompt templates) in prompts/ dir with proper frontmatter, description, body

Created 4 slash commands in prompts/ dir: /swarm, /task, /spawn, /delegate. All have valid YAML frontmatter (description + argument-hint), body content. Registered in package.json pi.prompts and files array.
Examined all 5 agent prompts and .pi system structure. Found: build.md, explore.md, plan.md, review.md, scout.md. Now validating frontmatter, model routing, and tool lists.

payload.title: zxc: rewrite all 5 agent prompts with comprehensive role definitions, tool usage patterns, constraints, and examples — reference ock .opencode/agent/ for depth

payload.summary:
Created and validated 4 slash commands (prompt templates) for the zxc .pi system:

1. /swarm (prompts/swarm.md) — Show swarm status and agent activity overview
2. /task (prompts/task.md) — Create a new swarm task and optionally claim it
3. /spawn (prompts/spawn.md) — Spawn a subagent to handle a task or mission
4. /delegate (prompts/delegate.md) — Create a task and spawn an agent to handle it in one step

All 4 have:
- Valid YAML frontmatter with opening/closing --- delimiters
- description field (required by pi)
- argument-hint field (optional, shown in autocomplete)
- Non-empty body content with usage instructions

Also updated package.json:
- Added 'prompts' entry to pi.prompts array for discovery
- Added 'prompts/**' to files array for npm packaging

Validated with Node.js YAML parser — all parse correctly.

payload.message: All 15 skills found and directory names are valid. CRITICAL ISSUE: None of the 15 SKILL.md files have the required YAML frontmatter (name + description). Per the Agent Skills spec, skills with missing description are NOT loaded by pi. Starting to add frontmatter to each file.
Examined project structure: agents/ dir has only code-reviewer.md. No .opencode/agent/ reference found. Need to infer 5 agent roles from project context and create comprehensive prompts.

Validated all 5 agent frontmatters. Found 2 categories of issues: (1) model='auto' used in all 5 agents - not a valid pi model ID, (2) readOnlyBash field in 4 agents - not a recognized pi frontmatter field. Now checking agent-modes.json and other config files for additional issues.

All 15 SKILL.md files fixed: added required YAML frontmatter (name + description) to each. Also fixed skill-creator template to include frontmatter in its example. All 15 skills now pass validation: frontmatter present, names valid (lowercase a-z, 0-9, hyphens, 1-64 chars), descriptions present and under 1024 chars.

payload.summary: All 15 skills in /root/Code/learning/Project/ock/.pi/skill/ validated and fixed. Critical issue found and resolved: ALL 15 SKILL.md files were missing required YAML frontmatter (name + description fields). Per the Agent Skills spec, skills with missing description are NOT loaded by pi. Fixes applied: (1) Added proper frontmatter with 'name' and 'description' to all 15 SKILL.md files — beads, context-initialization, deep-research, executing-plans, frontend-design, memory-grounding, playwright, security-and-hardening, skill-creator, structured-edit, swarm-coordination, systematic-debugging, think, verification-before-completion, writing-plans. (2) Fixed skill-creator template to include frontmatter in its example template. All 15 skills now pass validation: frontmatter present with valid names (lowercase a-z, 0-9, hyphens, 1-64 chars) and descriptions (all under 1024 chars), plus meaningful body content.

payload.message: Comprehensive audit complete. Found 6 categories of issues: (1) model:auto invalid in all 5 agents, (2) readOnlyBash unrecognized in 4 agents, (3) agent-modes.json not a built-in pi config, (4) all 15 skills missing YAML frontmatter, (5) settings.json path/name issues, (6) extension JSONs not valid pi extensions. Now fixing.

Created all 5 agent prompts: code-reviewer.md (102 lines), researcher.md (108 lines), planner.md (115 lines), worker.md (103 lines), debugger.md (130 lines). Each has comprehensive role definition, tool usage patterns, constraints, output format, and examples.

payload.summary: Rewrote all 5 agent prompts in agents/ with full depth. Each prompt includes: YAML frontmatter (role, persona, model, objective), Role Definition with scope and principles, Tool Usage Patterns (allowed/forbidden/workflow), Constraints (5-7 rules each), structured Output Format with markdown templates, and 2 concrete Examples each. Agents: code-reviewer.md (102 lines, read-only review specialist), researcher.md (108 lines, investigation and handoff), planner.md (115 lines, implementation planning), worker.md (103 lines, precise implementation), debugger.md (130 lines, systematic root cause diagnosis). All prompts reference project-specific context (JSONL feeds, harness server, file locks, swarm coordination) and use consistent formatting.

payload.message: All fixes applied and validated. Fixed: (1) removed model:auto from all 5 agents, (2) removed readOnlyBash from 4 agents, (3) added all 5 agents to agent-modes.json, (4) added YAML frontmatter to all 15 skills, (5) fixed settings.json paths and removed invalid env field. Live pi test confirms 21 skills load + all agent prompts parse correctly.

payload.summary: Validated and fixed all 5 agent prompts in the zxc .pi system. Issues found and fixed: (1) Removed invalid 'model: auto' from all 5 agent frontmatters (build, explore, plan, review, scout) — pi does not resolve 'auto' as a model ID. (2) Removed unrecognized 'readOnlyBash: true' from 4 agents (explore, plan, review, scout) — pi has no such frontmatter concept. (3) Expanded agent-modes.json from 2 to 5 modes to cover all agents, removed readOnlyBash from plan mode. (4) Added required YAML frontmatter (name + description) to all 15 skills in .pi/skill/ — without frontmatter, pi silently ignores skills per the Agent Skills spec. (5) Fixed settings.json: corrected skills/prompts to relative paths ('skill','command' resolving to .pi/skill/, .pi/command/), removed invalid 'env' field and non-path 'extensions' entries. Live pi test confirmed: 21 skills load (15 project + 5 gitnexus + 1 swarm), all agent prompts parse correctly, all command prompts have valid frontmatter.
